rationale: Training is already flat, so this run spends the budget on the final metric only. I kept the training recipe intact and added an exact serialization-time balancing pass: MLP hidden channels use a 1/3-power scale to preserve relu^2 blocks, and attention V/proj balancing now respects GQA head sharing. Both transforms are function-preserving before quantization and aim to reduce per-row int8 error where the current best script already showed sensitivity.
title: Extend exact pre-quantization balancing to relu^2 MLP channels and grouped V/proj heads
